name: TAP REAL ESTATE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. is focused on the acquisition, management, and tokenization of real estate. The company seeks to combine real estate fundamentals with blockchain tokenization technologies to enhance transparency and investor access. It plans to generate revenues from management fees, listing fees, and success fees on tokenized listings, as well as adding properties to its balance sheet.

exposures.sentence: TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. is focused on the acquisition, management, and tokenization of real estate.

catalysts.event: Complete long-term license agreement with TAP, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: As of March 25, 2026, the parties are in the final stages of completing a long-term license agreement.
